title: pleonotoma triphylla
intro: Pleonotoma triphylla, also known as the Triphylla or "three-leaved" plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including the reduction of fever, relief from respiratory issues, and the treatment of gastrointestinal problems. Pleonotoma triphylla can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion for medicinal use.
